page.title: Marbella Art Fair 2026: Yacht Charter Add-On

data.meta_description: Marbella Art Fair 2026: enhance your visit with a yacht charter from Puerto Banús. Book a luxury boat for 2–12 guests, drinks & skipper included.
data.summary: The Marbella Art Fair 2026 runs from 3–7 June at the Marbella Exhibition Centre. Combine your visit with a luxury yacht charter from Puerto Banús for a full cultural and coastal experience.
key_facts: Marbella Art Fair 2026 runs 3–7 June at the Marbella Exhibition Centre (10:00–21:00 daily).
Charter a yacht from Puerto Banús — 15 minutes from the fair by taxi.
Our fleet includes 17 boats, from 6.4m speedboats to 29m Ferretti 94.
All charters include a licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, and 21% IVA.
Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) from €749 for 2 hours (up to 11 guests).
Tier B Mangusta 80 from €4,719 for 4 hours (includes a free jet ski).
Combine a morning gallery tour with an afternoon cruise along the Golden Mile.
Book via WhatsApp — pricing on request for boats not in Tier A or B.

faq.q: When is the Marbella Art Fair 2026?
faq.a: The Marbella Art Fair 2026 runs from Wednesday 3 June to Sunday 7 June, open daily 10:00–21:00 at the Marbella Exhibition Centre (Palacio de Ferias y Congresos).

faq.q: How far is Puerto Banús from the art fair?
faq.a: Puerto Banús is about 6 km from the Marbella Exhibition Centre — a 15-minute taxi ride. You can easily combine a morning at the fair with an afternoon yacht charter.

faq.q: Can I charter a yacht for just a few hours?
faq.a: Yes. Our Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) are available from 2 hours at €749. Tier B Mangusta 80 requires a minimum of 4 hours (€4,719). Other boats are priced on request via WhatsApp.

faq.q: What is included in the charter price?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden extras.

faq.q: How many guests can I bring on a yacht charter?
faq.a: Capacity ranges from 5 guests on our speedboats up to 12 guests on larger yachts like the Mangusta 80, Azimut 58 Flybridge, or Ferretti 94. Check each boat's listing for exact capacity.

faq.q: Can I visit nearby coastal towns after the fair?
faq.a: Absolutely. Popular destinations include Cabopino, Estepona, Sotogrande, and Cala Cortés. Your skipper can tailor the itinerary based on your preferences and time available.

faq.q: How do I book a yacht charter for the art fair?
faq.a: Contact us via WhatsApp with your preferred date, number of guests, and desired boat. We'll confirm availability and send a personalised quote. Early booking recommended during fair week.

faq.q: What if the weather is bad on my charter day?
faq.a: We monitor forecasts closely. If conditions are unsafe, we'll offer a full refund or reschedule at no extra cost. Your safety is our priority.

data.body_html:
The Marbella Art Fair 2026 returns to the Marbella Exhibition Centre from 3–7 June, bringing together galleries, collectors, and contemporary art from across Europe. For visitors who want to elevate the experience, combining the fair with a yacht charter from Puerto Banús offers a seamless blend of culture and coastal luxury. Within 15 minutes of the fairgrounds, you can step from gallery halls onto a private boat, cruise the Mediterranean, and toast the sunset with cava. Here's how to plan your art-fair yacht charter in Marbella.

Marbella Art Fair 2026: dates, location & highlights

The Marbella Art Fair 2026 takes place at the Palacio de Ferias y Congresos (Marbella Exhibition Centre), Avenida José Meliá. Opening hours are 10:00–21:00 daily. The fair features modern and contemporary art from Spanish and international galleries, with a strong focus on painting, sculpture, and photography. Entry tickets are available on-site or online. The venue is a 6 km drive from Puerto Banús — roughly 15 minutes by taxi.

Why add a yacht charter to your art fair visit?

A Marbella art fair yacht charter turns a single event into a full-day experience. Start the morning browsing galleries, then head to Puerto Banús for an afternoon on the water. Cruise past the Golden Mile mansions, anchor at Cala del Faro for a swim, or simply enjoy the views of La Concha mountain from the flybridge. All our charters include a licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, and snacks — so you can relax completely.

Our fleet for art-fair charters

We operate 17 boats from Puerto Banús, from compact speedboats to superyachts. Here are the most popular options for art-fair visitors:

  • Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 guests) — €749/2h, €2,299/8h
  • Azimut 39 (12.5m, 11 guests) — €749/2h, €2,299/8h
  • Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 guests) — from €4,719/4h (includes free jet ski)
  • Azimut 58 Flybridge (17.6m, 12 guests) — pricing on request
  • Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 guests) — pricing on request

All prices include skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and 21% IVA. No surprises.

Sample itinerary: art fair + yacht charter

10:00–13:00 — Visit the Marbella Art Fair at the Exhibition Centre.
13:00–13:15 — Taxi to Puerto Banús (€10–15).
13:30–17:30 — 4-hour yacht charter: cruise east past the Golden Mile, anchor at Cala Cortés for swimming, enjoy lunch onboard.
17:30–18:00 — Return to Puerto Banús, taxi back to the fair for the evening programme (optional).

For a longer day, book an 8-hour charter and add a stop at Estepona or Sotogrande.

Booking details & availability

Charters are subject to availability, especially during fair week. We recommend booking at least 2 weeks in advance. To reserve, contact us via WhatsApp with your preferred date, number of guests, and boat type. We'll confirm availability and send a quote. For boats not in Tier A or B, pricing is on request.

Read more about our boat rental Marbella options and start planning your art-fair escape.

Frequently asked questions

When is the Marbella Art Fair 2026?

The Marbella Art Fair 2026 runs from Wednesday 3 June to Sunday 7 June, open daily 10:00–21:00 at the Marbella Exhibition Centre (Palacio de Ferias y Congresos).

How far is Puerto Banús from the art fair?

Puerto Banús is about 6 km from the Marbella Exhibition Centre — a 15-minute taxi ride. You can easily combine a morning at the fair with an afternoon yacht charter.

Can I charter a yacht for just a few hours?

Yes. Our Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) are available from 2 hours at €749. Tier B Mangusta 80 requires a minimum of 4 hours (€4,719). Other boats are priced on request via WhatsApp.

What is included in the charter price?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden extras.

How many guests can I bring on a yacht charter?

Capacity ranges from 5 guests on our speedboats up to 12 guests on larger yachts like the Mangusta 80, Azimut 58 Flybridge, or Ferretti 94. Check each boat's listing for exact capacity.

Can I visit nearby coastal towns after the fair?

Absolutely. Popular destinations include Cabopino, Estepona, Sotogrande, and Cala Cortés. Your skipper can tailor the itinerary based on your preferences and time available.

How do I book a yacht charter for the art fair?

Contact us via WhatsApp with your preferred date, number of guests, and desired boat. We'll confirm availability and send a personalised quote. Early booking recommended during fair week.

What if the weather is bad on my charter day?

We monitor forecasts closely. If conditions are unsafe, we'll offer a full refund or reschedule at no extra cost. Your safety is our priority.
